headline: LHX- A Great Way to Profit from Space Tech Boom
summary: As part of our Investing 2026 Forecast Series back at the start of the year, we introduced a brand-new storyline: The Space Economy. And we predicted 2026 would be the year this whole new market reached “critical mass.” I like L3Harris Technologies Inc. (LHX), says Bill Patalon, chief stock picker at Stock Picker’s Corner.
